name: Old Fashioned Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients in a large bowl. Add the eggs and buttermilk, mixing well.
2. Stir in the bacon drippings.
3. Preheat a 10-1/2 inch cast-iron skillet by greasing it well. Place the skillet in a preheated oven set to 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 3 minutes or until very hot.
4. Pour the batter into the hot skillet.
5. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes, or until golden brown.
